name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
The It Bag from over a decade ago, the CE Smile Bag, is back......
For the CE 2026 Spring/Summer show, Michael Rider brought the decade-old, iconic "Smile Bag" back into the public eye.
Besides the narrower, longer silhouette and the frown turning into a smile, the ultra-flat Flat Cabas Smile Bag has also been released. Many different sizes and colorways are coming soon ✅
Style No.: 123963
Color: White
Dimensions: 44.5x31.5x0.5cm
